level.title: Set Up Base
level.subdescription: Your Minion can talk. But they know nothing about your mission, your data, or your world. Time to change that. You will build a Custom GPT trained as a data-driven strategist, load it with 374 mission records, and interrogate the data to plan the perfect heist.

mission_targets: Build your first Custom GPT trained as a data-driven mission strategist
Upload the mission data file so your GPT can analyze 374 previous heist records
Find answers to the 5 mission questions from the data
Invent one special tool and compile everything into a mission debrief file

mission_gear.name: Custom GPT with Data
mission_gear.definition: A Custom GPT is a specialist version of ChatGPT trained with specific instructions. When you upload a data file, it becomes an analyst that can find patterns and insights from your exact dataset.
mission_gear.theme_translation: Think of it as giving your Minion a dossier. A regular Minion makes guesses. Your Data Strategist Minion reads 374 mission records, spots what nobody else noticed, and tells you exactly what the data says.
why_useful: Analyzes your specific data rather than guessing from general knowledge
Finds patterns and surprising insights humans miss
Answers questions grounded in real numbers and percentages
Stays consistent and focused on your mission throughout

mission_check: I created a Custom GPT called 1inMINION Data Strategist
I added the name, description, and instructions to the GPT
I uploaded the mission data file to my GPT
I got answers to all 5 mission questions from the data
My GPT invented a special tool for the mission
I generated the mission debrief and saved it as a txt file
